name: v0.15.0 — Geneco PoC Livechat MCP + Platform Admin
body:
## What's New

### Geneco Live Chat PoC
- Widget default agent binding and signed widget context
- MCP server integration for Geneco CRM (Dynamics 365)
- Widget settings CLI for PoC tenant setup and MCP auth configuration

### Platform Administration
- Super-admin tenant management UI and API
- Tenant provisioning, configuration, and lifecycle controls

### Fixes
- Widget settings CLI tenant path resolution
- MCP auth token handling

---
**Full changelog:** [`v0.14.0...v0.15.0`](https://github.com/keyreply/kira-cloudflare/compare/v0.14.0...v0.15.0)
